sp_widget.description: 2.7 Updated getTaskTreeListTitleNode() to pass just an object and refactor code. Update href to use dot notation for state and order for record watcher create and update. 2.6 updates for post back removal
sp_widget.name: Tasker List Task Tree
sp_widget.template:
Task List View

  • {{task.text.TaskNameNumber}}. {{task.text.primary_assignee}} {{task.text.assigned_to}} {{task.text.state}}
